Ukraine Conflict News





28 December 2025 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

Defense Policy / Programs

  • US Replacing Ineffective UN on Peacemaking - Trump Sputnik 28 Dec 2025 -- The United States is replacing the United Nations with settlement efforts, as this organization offers no help in peacemaking, US President Donald Trump said on Sunday.

  • BrahMos: Russia-India Missile Project Gains Worldwide Attention Sputnik 28 Dec 2025 -- The Russian-Indian BrahMos supersonic cruise missile project is attracting many countries worldwide, Indian Ambassador to Russia Vinay Kumar told Sputnik.

  • YJ-20 hypersonic missile filmed launching from Type 055 large destroyer in Chinese media report Global Times 28 Dec 2025 -- An official Chinese media report on Sunday unveiled the moment when a YJ-20 hypersonic anti-ship missile was launched from a Type 055 large destroyer of the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) Navy. Experts said that the maneuverable hypersonic missile can hit targets from an almost vertical angle, making it very difficult to intercept.
  • China's Military Shows Launch of YJ-20 Hypersonic Anti-Ship Missile for 1st Time - Reports Sputnik 28 Dec 2025 -- China's military has released footage of the launch of a YJ-20 hypersonic anti-ship missile from the Type 055 large destroyer Wuxi, the Global Times newspaper reported on Sunday.

  • Lai says Taiwan must raise cost of war, build indigenous defense to deter China CNA 28 Dec 2025 -- President Lai Ching-te (賴清德) said Taiwan must continue to raise the cost of aggression and strengthen its indigenous defense capabilities to deter China, stressing that peace can only be secured through strength, in an exclusive interview with Sanlih E-Television that aired Sunday.
  • US Arms Sales to Taiwan Push Region Toward Conflict - Chinese Embassy Sputnik 28 Dec 2025 -- The arms supply from the United States to Taiwan is pushing the region closer to conflict, the Chinese Embassy in Washington told RIA Novosti.

  • UK and Germany sign £52m contract for cutting-edge artillery UK MOD 28 Dec 2025 -- The UK has signed a £52 million contract with Germany for state-of-the-art military artillery.

  • Israel MOD and Rafael Deliver First Operational High-Power Laser System - Iron Beam to the IDF Israel MOD 28 Dec 2025 -- Following a complex development process, the Israel Ministry of Defense (IMOD) Directorate of Defense Research & Development (DDR&D) and Rafael Advanced Defense Systems delivered the first Iron Beam laser system to the IDF today (Sunday) at an official ceremony held at Rafael's headquarters in northern Israel.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Gaza health chief warns of population crisis amid targeted attacks on fertility centers IRNA 28 Dec 2025 -- Munir Al-Barsh, Director-General of Gaza's Ministry of Health, has revealed that monthly births have plummeted by 40 percent over the past year, dropping from 26,000 to just 17,000, disclosing that fertility and IVF centers have been directly targeted by Israeli forces.

  • Israeli settlers damage Palestinian properties in West Bank attack Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- Illegal Israeli settlers have once more staged an attack on Palestinian properties, damaging homes in the occupied West Bank.

  • Hezbollah chief says disarming resistance serves US-Israeli project IRNA 28 Dec 2025 -- Hezbollah's Secretary-General Sheikh Naim Qassem says that calls to disarm the resistance were part of a joint US-Israeli project, arguing that such demands served Israel rather than Lebanon, while Israeli attacks on the country continue.
  • Hezbollah chief rejects disarmament as US-Israeli project to weaken Lebanon Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- Hezbollah Secretary-General Sheikh Naim Qassem has warned that Lebanon is facing a "historic turning point," where it must choose between yielding to "US-Israeli domination" or preserving its sovereignty through resistance.

  • Russian FM calls for viable Palestinian State to address historical injustices IRNA 28 Dec 2025 -- Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov has reiterated his country's support for the formation of a Palestinian State in order to achieve enduring peace and stability across the West Asia region.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Araghchi urges Yemeni factions to preserve unity, avoid division IRNA 28 Dec 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi urged Yemen's political parties and groups to engage in dialogue to prevent the country's weakening and fragmentation, stressing the need to preserve Yemen's territorial integrity.
  • Iran FM warns against enemies' plot to disintegrate Yemen, urges unity Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says all Yemeni parties and groups must engage in dialogue and interaction to neutralize the enemies' plot aimed at weakening and disintegrating Yemen.
  • Iran, Qatar support Yemen's territorial integrity amid Saudi-Emirati clashes in south Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- Iran's Foreign Minister and Qatar's Foreign Minister, who also serves as Prime Minister, have emphasized the importance of preserving Yemen's territorial integrity and unity amid escalating clashes in the south.

  • Soldiers of the 55th Brigade Complete Their Operation in Southern Syria Israel Defense Forces 28 Dec 2025
  • Israeli forces invade Syrian village amid continued aggression Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- Israeli occupation forces have invaded the Syrian village of Taranga, advancing toward the outskirts of Jabatha al-Khashab in the northern countryside of Quneitra, Syrian state media reported.
  • Trump-backed push brings Jolani regime, Israel closer to deal: Israeli media Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- The Israeli regime and Syria's self-appointed new officials have made "significant progress" towards a so-called "security agreement" that could be signed in the near term, Israeli media report.

  • On 27 December 2025, security forces conducted an intelligence based operation in Kalat District of Balochistan, on reported presence of terrorists belonging to Indian proxy, Fitna al Hindustan. ISPR Pakistan 28 Dec 2025

  • UN Security Council, Arab League to hold emergency meetings on Israel's recognition of Somaliland Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- The UN Security Council and the Arab League are going to hold separate meetings this week on the repercussions of Israel's formal recognition of the Somali breakaway region of Somaliland as an independent state.
  • Joint Statement by the Foreign Ministers of Jordan,Egypt,Algeria Comoros,Djibouti,Gambia Iran,Iraq Kuwait,Libya Maldives,Nigeria Oman,Pakistan, Palestine,Qatar,Saudi Arabia,Somalia Sudan,Turkiye,Yemen and the OIC Pakistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Dec 2025 -- The Ministers of Foreign Affairs of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, the Arab Republic of Egypt, the People's Democratic Republic of Algeria, the Union of the Comoros, the Republic of Djibouti, the Republic of The Gambia, the Islamic Republic of Iran, the Republic of Iraq, the State of Kuwait, the State of Libya, the Republic of Maldives, the Federal Republic of Nigeria, the Sultanate of Oman, the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, the State of Palestine, the State of Qatar, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, the Federal Republic of Somalia, the Republic of the Sudan, the Republic of Türkiye, the Republic of Yemen, and the Organization of Islamic Cooperation, underscored the following:
  • Taiwan welcomes Israel's decision to formally recognize Somaliland CNA 28 Dec 2025 -- Taiwan has welcomed Israel's decision on Friday to formally recognize Somaliland as a sovereign nation, going against the reaction of Europe, the United States and other countries, which have opted to support Somalian sovereignty.
  • Yemen's leader warns of military action against any Israeli presence in Somaliland Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- The leader of Yemen's Ansarullah resistance movement has said that any Israeli presence in Somaliland will be considered a military target, as it constitutes aggression against Somalia and Yemen and a direct threat to regional security that must be confronted decisively.
  • Israel's recognition of Somaliland 'naked invasion' of Somalia's sovereignty: President Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- Somalia's president has condemned Israel's recognition of the breakaway region of Somaliland as a "naked invasion" of the country's sovereignty.
  • Venezuela Reaffirms Support for Somalia's Sovereignty Sputnik 28 Dec 2025 -- The Venezuelan government rejected Israel's move to recognize Somaliland and backed Somalia's unity and territorial integrity within its internationally recognized borders, Foreign Minister Yván Gil said in a statement on Telegram.

  • Wang Yi Meets with Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation of Cambodia Prak Sokhonn PRC MofA 28 Dec 2025 -- On December 28, 2025, Member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Foreign Minister Wang Yi met with Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation of Cambodia Prak Sokhonn in Yuxi, Yunnan Province.
  • First batch of China's emergency humanitarian aid arrives in Phnom Penh; Cambodia expresses sincere gratitude and appreciates China's ceasefire efforts Global Times 28 Dec 2025 -- The first batch of emergency humanitarian aid provided by the Chinese government to Cambodia, including tents, blankets, and food, arrived at Phnom Penh's Techo International Airport at noon local time on Sunday, the Chinese Embassy in Cambodia said on its official WeChat account.
  • China will deliver humanitarian aid to Cambodia for displaced people along border: Chinese FM Global Times 28 Dec 2025 -- China is willing to provide humanitarian supplies to Cambodia for the settlement of displaced people in border areas, said Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Yuxi City, southwest China's Yunnan Province on Sunday.

  • Female NPA fugitive arrested in Agusan del Norte Philippine News Agency 28 Dec 2025 -- Intensified police manhunt operations against insurgents facing charges in courts recently netted a female member of the New People's Army (NPA) in Agusan del Norte.

  • UN agency says over 10,000 people displaced in three days in Sudan Press TV 28 Dec 2025 -- A UN agency has reported that over 10,000 people were displaced due to fierce fighting in the past few days in Sudan.

News Reports

  • Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's interview with TASS News Agency, December 28, 2025 Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Dec 2025

  • Overseas spy agency posed as female netizen to target military-linked employee: MSS Global Times 28 Dec 2025 -- China's Ministry of State Security (MSS) released Sunday three cautionary cases on the risks of sharing job details online, including one in which an overseas espionage agency posed as a young, attractive female netizen trying to probe for internal information from an employee of a military-affiliated unit.
  • Industry Veterans Sound Alarm As Chinese Vehicles Tighten Grip On Europe's Auto Market RFE/RL 28 Dec 2025 -- Two decades into a successful career manufacturing interiors for the world's leading auto brands, Tomas, a former senior manager with an Italian multinational company, walked away from the car industry in the autumn of 2025.

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 28 Dec 2025

  • Kurti's VV Party Scores Clear Victory In Kosovo Vote, Looks To End Political Deadlock RFE/RL 28 Dec 2025 -- Prime Minister Albin Kurti's Vetevendosje (VV) party scored a clear victory in Kosovo's parliamentary elections, setting it in position to form a new government and potentially end the small Western Balkan nation's year-long political deadlock.
